'''Mudmen''' were [[Silicon/Legends|silicon]]-based [[Sentience/Legends|semi-sentient]] [[Species/Legends|beings]] found on [[Roon/Legends|Roon]]. A strong spray of condensed air or water could separate mudmen into small forms. Smaller mudmen could be kept as pets and exported throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. They were harmless and loved shiny things. Unlike most of the organisms found on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]], they were believed to be native to Roon. They were not intelligent enough to be a threat or interfere with colonists, and would only be a disturbance if a particularly shiny object was loose.

The [[Kaminoan/Legends|Kaminoans]] possessed at least one sample of mudmen for eventual [[Cloning/Legends|cloning]]. Previous attempts to clone were unsuccessful.<ref name="GatORW" />

{{Species-stub}}
